slides.text: 5 Secrets to *Viral Reels* (That Nobody Tells You)
slides.subtitle: Stop guessing and start scaling your reach today.

slides.title: 1. The 3-Second Rule
slides.text: Your *hook* must stop the scroll immediately. Use movement or text overlays.

slides.title: 2. High Save Rate
slides.text: Instagram prioritizes *saves* over likes. Create value that people want to revisit.
slides.annotation: This is the most important metric!
